title: Principle (GSM v1)
description: Identity-level, long-term normative constraint over system identity and qualities.

subject.description: Reference to the System or Role to which the principle applies. (Union not enforced in JSON Schema v1.)

verb.description: Constrained governance verb operating on the directObject quality.

directObject.description: Reference to a Quality owned by the same System.

applicabilityConditions.description: Optional applicability guard (SIE DSL LogicalExpression JSON AST). Absent/null means universal applicability. Recommended restricted form: conjunction of simple existence predicates over allow-listed ReferenceExpressions (e.g., exists(reference)), optionally combined with simple scalar comparisons on those references (e.g., axis.flag == true).

statement.description: Optional human-readable rendering of the principle. Non-normative: should be derivable from structured fields; must not be used as executable semantics.
